style_guide.art_style: hand-painted watercolor with visible brushstrokes, soft edges, and a textured feel
style_guide.color_palette: warm ochre, deep turquoise blue, sandy beige, lapis lazuli, forest green, burnt orange, and bright gold highlights
style_guide.lighting: soft, warm late afternoon sunlight, casting long, dramatic shadows and creating golden highlights on the stone

characters.name: Maya
characters.description: an adventurous girl with brown skin, dark curly hair, and bright green eyes. She wears a bright turquoise tunic, tan cargo shorts, and red sneakers.

characters.name: Leo
characters.description: a curious boy with fair skin, short blond hair, and blue eyes. He wears an orange and white striped t-shirt, blue denim overalls, and green sneakers.

pages.narration: WOW! The desert sun beat down on Maya and Leo as they stood in front of the largest stone building they had ever seen. Thousands of years old, it was a mountain made of giant sandstone blocks, shining in the heat. 'It's even bigger than it looks in books!' shouted Leo. Maya was already looking around, excited to explore one of the ancient Giza pyramids. Did you know there are over 100 pyramids in Egypt, not just these big ones?
pages.image_prompt: Hand-painted watercolor illustration with visible brushstrokes and soft edges, depicting Maya (brown skin, curly dark hair, green eyes, turquoise tunic, tan shorts, red sneakers) and Leo (fair skin, short blond hair, blue eyes, orange and white striped tee, denim overalls, green sneakers) standing before the massive, ancient pyramids of Giza in warm late afternoon sunlight with long shadows and golden highlights. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: the Great Pyramid of Giza in Egypt

pages.narration: Imagine trying to build this without cranes or trucks! The Great Pyramid was the tallest man-made structure in the world for over 3,800 years. Each of those huge stones weighs as much as two elephants, and there are over 2 million of them. Maya pointed to the smooth, whitish limestone still clinging to the very top. 'Originally, they all sparkled like that!' she explained.
pages.image_prompt: Hand-painted watercolor illustration with visible brushstrokes and soft edges, showing Maya (brown skin, curly dark hair, green eyes, turquoise tunic, tan shorts, red sneakers) and Leo (fair skin, short blond hair, blue eyes, orange and white striped tee, denim overalls, green sneakers) craned their necks to look up at the towering Great Pyramid, its sandy-beige blocks filling the frame under soft, warm late afternoon sunlight. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: at the base of the Great Pyramid

pages.narration: They were built as massive tombs for the Pharaohs, who were the kings and considered gods. The pyramid shape helped the Pharaoh's soul climb up to the sun god, Ra. Inside, there were secret passageways and a main chamber for the Pharaoh's body, which was turned into a mummy and surrounded by treasure. But how did they move those giant stones? And what secrets are hidden deep inside?
pages.image_prompt: Hand-painted watercolor illustration with visible brushstrokes and soft edges, featuring Maya (brown skin, curly dark hair, green eyes, turquoise tunic, tan shorts, red sneakers) and Leo (fair skin, short blond hair, blue eyes, orange and white striped tee, denim overalls, green sneakers) standing before the dark opening of the entrance passageway to the Great Pyramid, illuminated by soft, warm late afternoon sunlight from outside and torchlight from within. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.action: standing before the dark entrance, facing a choice

choice.question: What secrets do you want to uncover next?

option_a.label: Explore the deep, dark passageways inside!

pages.narration: With flickering torches and wide eyes, they stepped out of the sunlight and into the narrow, low tunnel. The air felt cool and ancient inside the massive mountain of stone. Maya's heart raced as she thought of all the history hidden within these walls. They followed the cramped passageway deeper and deeper, wondering if they were heading towards a real pharaoh's treasure chamber.
pages.image_prompt: Hand-painted watercolor illustration with visible brushstrokes and soft edges, depicting Maya (brown skin, curly dark hair, green eyes, turquoise tunic, tan shorts, red sneakers) and Leo (fair skin, short blond hair, blue eyes, orange and white striped tee, denim overalls, green sneakers) with wide eyes, holding flickering torches and creeping single-file through a narrow, dark stone passageway inside the Great Pyramid, illuminated by the warm, wavering torchlight. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: inside the dark, narrow stone passageway of the pyramid
visual.action: walking deep into the pyramid with torches

pages.narration: After a long climb, they reached the King's Chamber in the very center. It was a large room built entirely of massive red granite blocks, completely silent. Maya pointed out the sarcophagus, a big stone box where the mummy was once kept. 'He believed this room was his gateway to becoming a god in the afterlife!'
pages.image_prompt: Hand-painted watercolor illustration with visible brushstrokes and soft edges, showing Maya (brown skin, curly dark hair, green eyes, turquoise tunic, tan shorts, red sneakers) and Leo (fair skin, short blond hair, blue eyes, orange and white striped tee, denim overalls, green sneakers) standing in the silent King's Chamber inside the pyramid, their flickering torches illuminating the huge red granite blocks of the walls and the large, empty stone sarcophagus, all bathed in warm torchlight. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: the King's Chamber inside the Great Pyramid
visual.action: discovering the sarcophagus in the granite room

option_b.label: Discover the engineering secrets and construction outside!

pages.narration: Leo's engineering mind was buzzing! He led Maya to see how the stones were cut, shaped, and moved. They saw teams of hundreds of workers pulling massive sandstone blocks up huge, muddy ramps that spiraled around the construction site. These weren't mostly slaves, but skilled laborers and farmers paid in food and beer during the annual Nile flood season.
pages.image_prompt: Hand-painted watercolor illustration with visible brushstrokes and soft edges, depicting Leo (fair skin, short blond hair, blue eyes, orange and white striped tee, denim overalls, green sneakers) and Maya (brown skin, curly dark hair, green eyes, turquoise tunic, tan shorts, red sneakers) watching teams of workers pulling a massive sandstone block on a wooden sled up a long, muddy construction ramp that spirals around the growing Great Pyramid, all under the soft, warm late afternoon sunlight. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: the bustling construction site of the pyramid
visual.action: watching workers pull a large block up a ramp

pages.narration: They explored the nearby worker's village, a full town for the thousands of men and their families. It had bakeries, tool workshops, and doctors to treat injuries from the demanding work. Leo was impressed by their organization, proud teams competing to finish sections, like 'The Friends of Khufu Gang.' Building the pyramid took incredible planning, sweat, and community effort!
pages.image_prompt: Hand-painted watercolor illustration with visible brushstrokes and soft edges, showing Leo (fair skin, short blond hair, blue eyes, orange and white striped tee, denim overalls, green sneakers) and Maya (brown skin, curly dark hair, green eyes, turquoise tunic, tan shorts, red sneakers) in a bustling ancient workers' village, with bakers, tool workshops, and houses, all bathed in warm late afternoon sunlight, with the partially built Great Pyramid visible in the background. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: the busy ancient Egyptian workers' village
visual.action: exploring the village and tool shops

pages.narration: Emerging from the depths (or construction chaos), they looked at the pyramids with new wonder. Whether marveling at the ingenious engineering that moved mountains of stone or the deep devotion of the people who built these monumental tombs, they felt the echo of thousands of years of human history. Their journey was a small step in understanding the incredible legacy of ancient Egypt, still standing strong in the desert sun.
